---
title: "2 and 3 factor decomposition"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, assets/mystyle.scss]
    footer: "[Workshop Home](./index.html)"
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    callout-appearance: simple
    code-line-numbers: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-annotations: hover
    code-copy: hover
    chalkboard: true
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

```{r}
#| include: false
options(digits=2)
```



# Standardisation and Decomposition 

---

![](pres1/Slide1.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide2.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide3.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide4.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide5.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide6.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide7.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide8.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide9.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide10.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide11.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide12.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide13.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}


---

![](pres1/Slide14.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}


---

![](pres1/Slide15.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}


---

![](pres1/Slide16.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide16.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}


---

![](pres1/Slide17.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide18.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide19.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide20.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide21.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide22.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide23.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide24.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide25.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide26.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide27.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide28.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide29.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide30.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide31.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide32.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide33.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

---

![](pres1/Slide34.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}


## Decomposition - {DasGuptR}

### 2 factor

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: true
library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 5/15, 3/5,
  "P2", 10/15, 8/10,
) 
mydat
```

:::
:::{.column width="50%" .fragment}

```{r}
#| echo: true
library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("psq","pgr"))

head(dgres)
```


:::
::::

## Decomposition - {DasGuptR}

### 2 factor

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: true
library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 5/15, 3/5,
  "P2", 10/15, 8/10,
) 
mydat
```

:::
:::{.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: true
library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("psq","pgr"))

dg_table(dgres)
```

:::
::::


## Decomposition - {DasGuptR}

### 3 factor  

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: true
library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~pcol,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 11/15, 4/11, 3/4,
  "P2", 13/15, 10/13, 8/10,
) 
mydat
```

:::
:::{.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: true
library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("pcol","psq","pgr"))

head(dgres)
```

:::
::::

## Decomposition - {DasGuptR}

### 3 factor  

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: true
library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~pcol,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 11/15, 4/11, 3/4,
  "P2", 13/15, 10/13, 8/10,
) 
mydat
```

:::
:::{.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: true
library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("pcol","psq","pgr"))

dg_table(dgres)
```

:::
::::

## sub-populations

![](pres1/Slide36.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

## sub-populations

![](pres1/Slide37.PNG){fig-align="center" width="100%"}

## sub-populations

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="50%"}
```{r}
#| echo: true
mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop, ~shape,    ~pshp, ~pgreen,
  1,    "circle",  10/24,  2/10,
  1,    "square",  10/24,  3/10,
  1,    "triangle", 4/24,  3/4,
  2,    "circle",   7/24,  2/7,
  2,    "square",   7/24,  4/7,
  2,    "triangle",10/24,  8/10,
)
mydat
```
:::
:::{.column width="50%"}

Rate_green = sum ( prop_shape_i * prop_green_i )


:::
::::

## sub-populations

```{r}
#| echo: true
dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("pshp","pgreen"),
       id_vars = c("shape"),
       ratefunction = "sum(pshp*pgreen)") |>
  dg_table()
```












# End
